ghost_child.text: Have you seen my teddy bear?

choices.text: [Give Teddy Bear] Here, I found your toy.
choices.actionMessage: The ghost hugs the bear and calms down.

choices.text: I don't have time for your games. Get out of my way.
choices.actionMessage: The ghost's eyes turn red with anger!

appeased.text: ...you found it. Thank you. I can rest now.

post_battle.text: Thank you for the teddy bear...

rat_chef.text: MY kitchen! Nobody enters MY kitchen!

choices.actionMessage: The rat smiles under its whiskers.
The rat raises its cleaver in a frenzy!

appeased.text: ...you think my cooking smells good? Perhaps you can stay.

post_battle.text: The kitchen is clean, finally. You can eat something if you want.

mirror_ghost.text: So, you defeated yourself? Or is it just another reflection?

real.text: Maybe... maybe I am the shadow.

post_battle.text: Look into the mirror... do you see who is really there?
